title: cordia microphylla
intro: Cordia microphylla, also known as the Mexican cherry or San Juan cherry, is a small evergreen tree or shrub native to the tropical regions of Central America and Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its high content of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Cordia microphylla include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce inflammation and improve overall well-being. Cordia microphylla is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and is also used in traditional medicine to promote digestive health and reduce stress.
